guidance.en: Check all factors that apply: prior threats to take child, prior actual abduction, no strong ties to community, recent sale of property, quitting job, closing bank accounts, obtaining passport/travel documents, domestic violence history, substance abuse, mental health concerns.

guidance.en: Specify what travel restrictions you want. Example: 'Respondent shall not remove the child from California without prior written consent of Petitioner or court order.'
guidance.es: Especifique qué restricciones de viaje desea.
